splash.seoTitle: Aurya — the holistic retreats marketplace is about to open
splash.seoDesc: Aurya connects those who create holistic retreats with those seeking them. We're getting ready to launch: leave your email and be among the first.
splash.title: The holistic retreats marketplace is about to open
splash.subtitle: Aurya connects those who craft authentic wellbeing experiences with those looking for them. Choose your path.
splash.travelerText: Discover the project and be among the first to book at launch.
splash.operatorText: Bring your retreats to Aurya and let the right people find you.
splash.peek: Take a peek at the retreats preview

banner.title: We're getting ready to launch.
banner.body: These are sample retreats: soon you'll find the real ones here, bookable online.

form.name: Your name (optional)
form.consent: I agree to be contacted by email about the launch of Aurya.
form.thanksBody: We'll write to you the moment Aurya opens. See you soon.

op.seoTitle: Aurya for practitioners — bring your retreats where people are looking for you
op.seoDesc: On Aurya your holistic retreats get found by the people seeking them: search visibility, bookings with a protected deposit, effortless management. Sign up for the launch.
op.title: Bring your retreats where the people who seek them can find you
op.subtitle: Aurya is about to open: the Italian marketplace for holistic retreats, built to help you get found and booked online. Leave your email and be among the first practitioners on board.
op.b1b: Your profile and retreats are optimized for search engines and your area: you appear to the people looking for exactly what you offer.
op.b2b: Collect payments online with a deposit and balance, protected by Stripe. Fewer empty spots, fewer no-shows.
op.b3b: Calendar, participants, automatic reminders and verified reviews: you focus on the experience, Aurya takes care of the rest.
op.ctaTitle: Want to be among the first?
op.ctaBody: We'll write to you as soon as practitioner sign-ups open.

tr.seoTitle: Aurya — holistic retreats chosen with care, online soon
tr.seoDesc: Aurya is about to open: holistic retreats from carefully selected practitioners, with a protected deposit and verified reviews. Leave your email and be among the first to book.
tr.title: Holistic retreats, chosen with care
tr.subtitle: Aurya is about to open. Yoga, meditation, walking journeys and so much more, from carefully selected practitioners across Italy. Be among the first to book.
tr.formTitle: We'll let you know the moment we open
tr.formBody: Leave your email: you'll be among the first to discover the retreats and to book, with something special for those who are here from the start.
tr.b1b: Every practitioner has a verified profile: you know who's organizing, where and what they offer, before you set off.
tr.b2b: Secure your spot with a deposit protected by Stripe. No surprises, no wiring money into the unknown.
tr.b3b: Only those who truly took part can leave a review. Choose with the trust of authentic voices.
